item.title: CVE-2019-3405
item.description: In the 3.1.3.64296 and lower version of 360F5, the third party can trigger the device to send a deauth frame by constructing and sending a specific illegal 802.11 Null Data Frame, which will cause other wireless terminals connected to disconnect from…

item.title: CVE-2020-15724
item.description: In the version 12.1.0.1005 and below of 360 Total Security, when the Gamefolde calls GameChrome.exe, there exists a local privilege escalation vulnerability. An attacker who could exploit DLL hijacking to bypass the hips could execute arbitrary code…

item.title: CVE-2020-15722
item.description: In version 12.1.0.1004 and below of 360 Total Security,when TPI calls the browser process, there exists a local privilege escalation vulnerability. An attacker who could exploit DLL hijacking could execute arbitrary code on the Local system.

item.title: CVE-2020-15723
item.description: In the version 12.1.0.1004 and below of 360 Total Security, when the main process of 360 Total Security calls GameChrome.exe, there exists a local privilege escalation vulnerability. An attacker who could exploit DLL hijacking to bypass the hips coul…

item.title: CVE-2019-3404
item.description: By adding some special fields to the uri ofrouter app function, the user could abuse background app cgi functions withoutauthentication. This affects 360 router P0 and F5C.

item.title: CVE-2018-19031
item.description: A command injection vulnerability exists when the authorized user passes crafted parameter to background process in the router. This affects 360 router series products (360 Safe Router P0,P1,P2,P3,P4), the affected version is V2.0.61.58897.
